header.description: Handle Acuity Scheduling events via webhooks

appointment.canceled.description: Is called whenever an appointment is canceled

appointment.changed.description: Is called when the appointment is changed in any way

appointment.rescheduled.description: Is called when the appointment is rescheduled to a new time

appointment.scheduled.description: Is called once when an appointment is initially booked

order.completed.description: Is called when an order is completed

resolveData.description: By default does the webhook-data only contain the ID of the object. If this option gets activated, it will resolve the data automatically.
